title: Claude Code settings.json
description: Permissive schema for ~/.claude/settings.json, <project>/.claude/settings.json, and <project>/.claude/settings.local.json. Starts loose (additionalProperties: true) and tightens over time. The research agent updates this when new settings keys are documented upstream.

model.description: Default model ID for Claude Code sessions (e.g., 'claude-sonnet-4-6', 'claude-opus-4-7').

env.description: Environment variables injected into every tool call.

hooks.description: Hook configuration. Keys are event names (PreToolUse, PostToolUse, Stop, SubagentStop, Notification, UserPromptSubmit, PreCompact, SessionStart, SessionEnd, etc.).

editorMode.description: Key binding mode for the input prompt. Upstream docs (settings.md) list only 'normal' and 'vim'; other values like 'emacs' are NOT accepted.

apiKeyHelper.description: Custom script to be executed in /bin/sh to generate an auth value. Sent as X-Api-Key and Authorization: Bearer headers.

cleanupPeriodDays.description: Session files older than this period are deleted at startup (default: 30). Setting to 0 is rejected with a validation error.

includeCoAuthoredBy.description: DEPRECATED — use `attribution` instead. Whether to include the co-authored-by Claude byline in git commits/PRs (default: true).

attribution.description: Customize attribution for git commits and pull requests. Replaces deprecated includeCoAuthoredBy.

forceLoginMethod.description: Restrict login to Claude.ai accounts ('claudeai') or Claude Console / API-usage-billing accounts ('console').
